description: A letter issued by an employer verifying an individual's employment history and job details.

employee_name.instruction: The full name of the employee whose employment is being verified.

employer_name.instruction: The name of the company or organization employing the individual.

job_title.instruction: The job title or position held by the employee.

employment_start_date.instruction: The date the employee began working for the employer.

employment_end_date.instruction: The date the employee stopped working for the employer if applicable.

salary_or_wage.instruction: The employee's salary, hourly wage, or compensation if stated in the letter.

issuer_name.instruction: The name of the person issuing or signing the employment verification letter.

issuer_title.instruction: The job title of the person issuing the letter, such as HR manager or supervisor.
